wordplay_note: The timid bird who turns out to be the most dangerous man alive
card_description: Doug Quail (meaning "Quail = small timid bird") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *We Can Remember It for You Wholesale*. Clerk who discovers his implanted Mars memories are real and he saved Earth as a child. Name note: The timid bird who turns out to be the most dangerous man alive. The meek everyman who is secretly extraordinary — memory as contested reality. First appears in *We Can Remember It for You Wholesale*.
first_work: We Can Remember It for You Wholesale
work_list: We Can Remember It for You Wholesale
